tasks.title: Project Setup and Docker Infrastructure
tasks.description: Initialize monorepo structure with Docker Compose for Next.js store frontend, Next.js ERP frontend, FastAPI backend, PostgreSQL, and ChromaDB services.
tasks.details: Create root docker-compose.yml with services: store-frontend (Next.js 14+), erp-frontend (Next.js 14+), backend (FastAPI Python 3.12, SQLAlchemy, Pydantic), postgres (15+), chromadb. Include .env.example with all required vars (DB_URL, JWT_SECRET, STRIPE_KEY, etc.). Add healthchecks and volume mounts for persistence. Use multi-stage Dockerfiles for production optimization.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify docker-compose up starts all services without errors. Check health endpoints respond 200. Confirm PostgreSQL and ChromaDB accessible via connection strings. Test inter-service networking.

subtasks.title: Create Monorepo Folder Structure and Service Dockerfiles
subtasks.description: Set up the root directory structure and create multi-stage Dockerfiles for store-frontend, erp-frontend, backend, postgres, and chromadb services.
subtasks.details: Organize folders as /apps/store-frontend, /apps/erp-frontend, /apps/backend, /db, /vector-db. Implement multi-stage builds: dev stage with hot-reload, prod stage optimized. Use node:20-alpine for Next.js, python:3.12-slim for FastAPI, official postgres:15 and chromadb images.
subtasks.testStrategy: Build each Dockerfile individually with 'docker build -f apps/store-frontend/Dockerfile .', verify no errors and layers optimized (<500MB prod images).

subtasks.title: Develop Root docker-compose.yml with Services and Networking
subtasks.description: Configure docker-compose.yml defining all 5 services with networks, volumes, healthchecks, and dependency orchestration.
subtasks.details: Define services with build contexts from subdirs, expose ports (3000 store, 3001 erp, 8000 backend, 5432 postgres, 8001 chromadb). Create 'backend-net', 'db-vol', 'chroma-vol'. Add healthchecks: pg_isready for postgres, curl /health for others. Use depends_on with condition: service_healthy.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run 'docker compose up -d', check 'docker compose ps' all healthy, verify logs no errors, test inter-service connectivity (backend to postgres/chromadb).

subtasks.title: Create .env.example with All Required Environment Variables
subtasks.description: Generate comprehensive .env.example file listing all necessary vars for services including secrets and connection strings.
subtasks.details: Include DATABASE_URL=postgresql://..., CHROMA_URL=http://chromadb:8001, JWT_SECRET=..., STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=..., NEXTAUTH_SECRET=..., CORS_ORIGINS=http://localhost:3000,http://localhost:3001. Add comments explaining each var's purpose and service usage.
subtasks.testStrategy: Copy to .env, run docker compose up, verify services start without missing env errors, check backend logs parse DB_URL correctly.

subtasks.title: Add Documentation and Initial Smoke Test Scripts
subtasks.description: Write README.md with setup instructions and create smoke test script to validate full stack startup and basic connectivity.
subtasks.details: Document: clone, cp .env.example .env, docker compose up -d, access URLs. Create test-smoke.sh: docker compose up -d, wait for healthy, curl health endpoints, psql connect test query, chroma client ping. Make executable.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run ./test-smoke.sh, verify all checks pass with 0 exit code, services responsive, no connection failures.

tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Monorepo folder structure and initial Dockerfiles for each service with multi-stage builds, 2) Root docker-compose.yml with all services, networks, volumes, healthchecks, 3) .env.example with all environment variables and secrets, 4) Documentation and initial smoke test scripts for docker-compose up.

tasks.title: PostgreSQL Schema and Alembic Migrations
tasks.description: Implement database schema for all entities with proper relationships and indexes per PRD data models.
tasks.details: Create SQLAlchemy models for User, Role, Product, ProductVariant, Inventory, InventoryMovement, Order, OrderItem, Payment, Cart, CartItem, Category. Add indexes on frequently queried fields (product.category_id, order.status, inventory.quantity). Configure Alembic for migrations. Include constraints: foreign keys, unique email, check constraints for quantities > 0. Seed initial roles (admin, employee).
tasks.testStrategy: Run migrations, verify schema matches PRD entities. Test foreign key constraints prevent invalid inserts. Query performance tests on indexed fields. Validate seed data creates correct roles.

subtasks.title: Create SQLAlchemy Models for Core Entities
subtasks.description: Define SQLAlchemy models for User, Role, Product, and Category entities with basic fields and initial relationships.
subtasks.details: Include fields like user.email (unique), role.name, product.name/description/price, category.name. Add basic foreign keys (product.category_id). Use proper data types and NOT NULL constraints per best practices.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify model definitions compile without errors. Test basic CRUD operations in a test database.

subtasks.title: Implement Complex Entities and Relationships
subtasks.description: Create SQLAlchemy models for ProductVariant, Inventory, InventoryMovement, Order, OrderItem, Payment, Cart, CartItem with full relationships.
subtasks.details: Define relationships: Order→OrderItem→ProductVariant→Inventory, Cart→CartItem→ProductVariant. Add foreign keys with ON DELETE CASCADE where appropriate. Ensure referential integrity.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test relationship queries (e.g., order.items). Verify cascade deletes work correctly without orphan records.

subtasks.title: Add Indexes, Constraints, and Validation
subtasks.description: Implement indexes on product.category_id, order.status, inventory.quantity. Add check constraints (quantities > 0) and unique constraints.
subtasks.details: Use SQLAlchemy Index() for specified fields. Add CheckConstraint(quantity > 0). Ensure unique email on User. Follow naming conventions and normalization best practices.
subtasks.testStrategy: Attempt invalid inserts (negative quantity, duplicate email) - should fail. Run EXPLAIN ANALYZE on queries to verify index usage.

subtasks.title: Configure Alembic for Migrations
subtasks.description: Set up Alembic configuration, generate initial migration scripts from models, and apply to PostgreSQL database.
subtasks.details: Run alembic init, configure alembic.ini with DB URL. Generate migration with alembic revision --autogenerate. Review and adjust migration for indexes/constraints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run alembic upgrade head on fresh DB. Verify schema matches models via pg_dump or SQL inspection.

subtasks.title: Seed Initial Data and Test Migrations
subtasks.description: Create seed script for initial roles (admin, employee). Write migration testing scripts and validate full schema.
subtasks.details: Add alembic revision for seed data with INSERT for roles. Create test script to verify foreign keys, indexes, constraints, and seed data. Align schema with PRD data models.
subtasks.testStrategy: Run full migration + seed. Test constraints prevent invalid data. Query performance tests on indexed fields. Compare schema to PRD entities.

tasks.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) SQLAlchemy models for core entities (User, Role, Product, Category), 2) Complex entities with relationships (Order, Inventory, Cart systems), 3) Indexes, constraints, and validation logic, 4) Alembic migration configuration and initial migrations, 5) Seed data and migration testing scripts.

tasks.title: FastAPI Backend Core with JWT Authentication
tasks.description: Setup FastAPI app with JWT auth middleware, RBAC, CORS, rate limiting, and global exception handler.
tasks.details: Initialize FastAPI with /api/v1 prefix. Implement JWT middleware using python-jose[cryptography], bcrypt for passwords. Add Depends() for current_user extraction with role checks. Configure CORS for frontend origins. Add slowapi for rate limiting on /auth. Implement structured JSON logging with structlog. Global exception handler for 500 errors.
tasks.testStrategy: Test protected endpoints return 401 without token, 403 for wrong role. Verify token expiry. Test rate limiting blocks excessive auth attempts. Confirm CORS headers on responses.

subtasks.title: FastAPI App Initialization, CORS, Logging, Exception Handlers
subtasks.description: Initialize FastAPI app with /api/v1 prefix, configure CORS for frontend origins, implement structured JSON logging with structlog, and add global exception handler for 500 errors.
subtasks.details: Create main.py with FastAPI(app, prefix='/api/v1'), CORSMiddleware(allow_origins=[frontend URLs]), structlog processor chain for JSON output, @app.exception_handler(500) with custom response. Ensure logging captures request/response metadata.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify app starts with /api/v1 prefix, CORS headers present in responses, structlog outputs JSON, 500 handler returns structured error.

subtasks.title: JWT Middleware, Bcrypt Password Hashing, current_user Depends
subtasks.description: Implement JWT middleware using python-jose[cryptography], bcrypt for password hashing/verification, and current_user dependency extraction with token validation.
subtasks.details: Add security config (SECRET_KEY, ALGORITHM, expiry), pwd_context with bcrypt, OAuth2PasswordBearer, get_current_user(token: str = Depends()) with jwt.decode and user fetch. Include hash_password/verify_password utilities.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test token generation/decoding, current_user raises 401 on invalid/expired tokens, bcrypt correctly hashes/verifies passwords.

subtasks.title: RBAC Role Checks, Rate Limiting, Auth Endpoint Testing
subtasks.description: Add RBAC role checks in dependencies, configure slowapi rate limiting on /auth endpoints, implement and test auth endpoints (login/register).
subtasks.details: Create get_current_active_user_with_role(role: str) using Depends(current_user), slowapi.Limiter on APIRouter('/auth'), add /auth/login and /auth/register with token response. Test role-based 403 errors.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test protected endpoints return 401 without token, 403 wrong role, rate limiting blocks excessive /auth attempts, auth endpoints generate valid tokens.

tasks.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) FastAPI app initialization, CORS, logging, exception handlers, 2) JWT middleware, bcrypt, and current_user Depends(), 3) RBAC role checks, rate limiting with slowapi, and auth endpoint testing.

tasks.title: Product CRUD API Endpoints
tasks.description: Implement full CRUD operations for products with filtering, pagination, and Pydantic validation.
tasks.details: Create Pydantic schemas for ProductCreate, ProductUpdate, ProductResponse. Implement GET /products (query params: category, price_min/max, status, limit/offset), POST /products, GET /products/{id}, PATCH /products/{id}, DELETE /products/{id}. Add admin-only permissions. Return 422 for validation errors. Use SQLAlchemy async session.
tasks.testStrategy: Create product via POST, verify GET list includes it. Test filtering returns correct subset. Verify pagination with limit/offset. Test unauthorized DELETE returns 403. Validate all Pydantic schemas reject invalid data.

subtasks.title: Pydantic Schemas and Validation Logic
subtasks.description: Create Pydantic schemas for ProductCreate, ProductUpdate, ProductResponse with validation rules for fields like category, price, status.
subtasks.details: Define BaseModel subclasses with Field validators for required fields, price ranges, enum status values. Ensure 422 error handling for invalid inputs using FastAPI's automatic validation.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test invalid data inputs return 422 with specific error messages for each schema. Validate price_min <= price_max.

subtasks.title: Core CRUD Endpoints with Async SQLAlchemy
subtasks.description: Implement POST /products, GET /products/{id}, PATCH /products/{id}, DELETE /products/{id} using async SQLAlchemy sessions.
subtasks.details: Use AsyncSession from sqlalchemy.ext.asyncio with asyncpg driver. Implement create/read/update/delete repository methods with await session.execute() and proper commit/rollback patterns.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create product via POST, verify GET /{id} returns it. Test PATCH updates fields correctly. DELETE removes product and returns 404 on subsequent GET.

subtasks.title: Advanced Filtering, Pagination, and Admin Permissions
subtasks.description: Add GET /products list endpoint with query params (category, price_min/max, status, limit/offset) and admin-only access for write operations.
subtasks.details: Build dynamic SQLAlchemy queries with filter() for category/status, between() for price range, offset()/limit(). Use FastAPI Depends for current_user and admin role checks. Implement pagination metadata in response.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test filtering returns correct subset (e.g., price_min=10 returns only matching). Verify pagination with limit=5/offset=0. Non-admin DELETE returns 403.

tasks.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Pydantic schemas and validation logic, 2) Core CRUD endpoints with async SQLAlchemy, 3) Advanced filtering/pagination/query params and admin permissions.

tasks.title: Consumer Storefront - Catalog and Search UI
tasks.description: Build Next.js store frontend with hero banner, responsive product grid, filters, sorting, pagination/infinite scroll.
tasks.details: Create pages/index.tsx with hero banner (black/light blue palette). Implement ProductGrid component with 1/2/4 column responsive layout using Tailwind CSS. Add FilterSidebar with category/price range. Sorting dropdown (price asc/desc, best sellers). Use SWR or React Query for data fetching from /api/v1/products. Implement infinite scroll with IntersectionObserver.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify responsive grid changes columns on resize. Test filters update results without reload. Confirm sorting reorders correctly. Test infinite scroll loads next page on scroll. Check empty states display properly.

subtasks.title: Implement Hero Banner and Responsive ProductGrid
subtasks.description: Create pages/index.tsx with hero banner using black/light blue palette and ProductGrid component with 1/2/4 column responsive Tailwind layout.
subtasks.details: Use Tailwind CSS for responsive grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4). Hero banner with full-width image/text overlay. Include loading skeleton for grid. Ensure mobile-first responsive breakpoints.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify hero banner displays correctly on all screen sizes. Test grid changes columns on resize (1/2/4). Check Tailwind classes apply responsive styles.

subtasks.title: Build FilterSidebar with Category and Price Controls
subtasks.description: Add FilterSidebar component with category checkboxes and price range slider that updates product results dynamically.
subtasks.details: Use shadcn/ui components for sidebar, checkboxes, and slider. Implement local state for filters. Pass filter params to data fetching hook. Debounce price slider changes. Mobile: collapse to top bar.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test category filter narrows results correctly. Verify price range excludes out-of-range products. Confirm filters persist on re-render and clear button works.

subtasks.title: Add Sorting Dropdown and SWR/React Query Data Fetching
subtasks.description: Implement sorting dropdown (price asc/desc, best sellers) and integrate SWR or React Query for fetching from /api/v1/products.
subtasks.details: Choose React Query (TanStack Query) with useQuery hook. Fetch with query params for filters/sorting (category, price_min/max, sort). Sorting options: price_asc, price_desc, best_sellers. Include error boundaries.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify sorting reorders products correctly (low→high price, best sellers first). Test data fetches with filter params. Confirm optimistic updates and error handling.

subtasks.title: Implement Infinite Scroll with IntersectionObserver
subtasks.description: Add infinite scroll using IntersectionObserver for loading next product pages and handle empty/loading states.
subtasks.details: Use useInfiniteQuery from React Query. Create sentinel div at grid bottom. IntersectionObserver triggers next page fetch. Handle 'no more items' state. Show empty state when no products match filters.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test infinite scroll loads next page on scroll reach. Verify stops when no more data. Check empty state displays with filtered results. Confirm loading spinners appear correctly.

tasks.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Hero banner and responsive ProductGrid with Tailwind, 2) FilterSidebar with category/price controls, 3) Sorting dropdown and SWR/React Query data fetching, 4) Infinite scroll with IntersectionObserver and empty states.

tasks.title: Semantic Search with ChromaDB and LangChain
tasks.description: Integrate ChromaDB vector search with LangChain embeddings, sync with product catalog changes.
tasks.details: Install chromadb, langchain, langchain-openai (or huggingface). Create embedding service using OpenAI text-embedding-3-small or sentence-transformers. Implement POST /products/{id}/index-vector endpoint (admin only). Add background task to reindex on product create/update/delete. GET /search?query=... returns hybrid results (semantic + keyword). Use PostgreSQL trigger for sync.
tasks.testStrategy: Index sample products, search 'comfortable running shoes' returns relevant results. Test reindexing updates search results. Verify keyword fallback works. Measure query time < 200ms. Test sync on product updates.

subtasks.title: Embedding Service Setup
subtasks.description: Create embedding service using OpenAI text-embedding-3-small or sentence-transformers for product data.
subtasks.details: Install langchain-openai or sentence-transformers. Implement embedding function class with batch processing support. Configure API keys via environment variables. Test embedding generation on sample product descriptions.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify embeddings for 10 sample products match expected dimensions (1536 for OpenAI). Measure embedding time < 100ms per product.

subtasks.title: ChromaDB Integration and Indexing Endpoints
subtasks.description: Integrate ChromaDB with LangChain and implement POST /products/{id}/index-vector endpoint (admin only).
subtasks.details: Use langchain-chroma to create persistent Chroma client connected to Docker service. Implement endpoint to embed product data and add to collection with id, metadata, document. Add admin authentication middleware. Support delete/update operations.
subtasks.testStrategy: POST index-vector succeeds for admin user, fails for non-admin (403). Query collection verifies product stored with correct embedding.

subtasks.title: Hybrid Search Implementation
subtasks.description: Implement GET /search?query=... endpoint returning hybrid results combining semantic and keyword search.
subtasks.details: Use Chroma similarity_search for semantic results with query embedding. Add PostgreSQL full-text search (tsvector) for keyword fallback. Merge and rank results by score. Support pagination and filters. Limit total results to 20.
subtasks.testStrategy: Search 'comfortable running shoes' returns relevant semantic matches. Keyword-only terms fallback to PostgreSQL results. Query time < 200ms.

subtasks.title: PostgreSQL Triggers for Sync Detection
subtasks.description: Create PostgreSQL triggers to detect product create/update/delete and queue reindexing tasks.
subtasks.details: Add products_sync_queue table with product_id, operation (create/update/delete), timestamp. Implement AFTER INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE triggers on products table to insert queue records. Use NOTIFY/LISTEN for real-time detection in FastAPI.
subtasks.testStrategy: Manually insert/update/delete product, verify queue record created. Confirm trigger fires on concurrent transactions.

subtasks.title: Background Reindexing and Validation
subtasks.description: Implement background task worker to process sync queue and reindex ChromaDB. Add performance testing.
subtasks.details: Use FastAPI BackgroundTasks or Celery to poll/monitor sync queue. On queue item, call index-vector endpoint or direct Chroma update/delete. Add sync validation endpoint showing queue lag. Load test with 100 concurrent searches.
subtasks.testStrategy: Update product via CRUD, verify background task reindexes within 5s. Search reflects changes. End-to-end: create→index→search cycle. Measure P95 query latency < 200ms.

tasks.expansionPrompt: Break down into: 1) Embedding service setup (OpenAI/sentence-transformers), 2) ChromaDB integration and indexing endpoints, 3) Hybrid search (semantic+keyword) implementation, 4) Background reindexing and PostgreSQL triggers, 5) Performance testing and sync validation.

tasks.title: Shopping Cart Implementation
tasks.description: Implement cart with localStorage for guests, backend sync for auth users, stock validation.
tasks.details: Backend: POST /carts, POST /carts/{cart_id}/items, PATCH/DELETE items. Frontend: CartContext with localStorage/session sync. Block add if quantity > available stock via /products/{id}/stock check. Real-time subtotal calculation. Slide-over cart panel with quantity controls.
tasks.testStrategy: Add item as guest, refresh page - cart persists. Login - cart syncs to backend. Test stock block shows error. Verify subtotal updates on quantity change. Test remove empties cart correctly.

subtasks.title: Backend Cart Endpoints and Stock Validation
subtasks.description: Implement FastAPI endpoints for cart management and integrate stock checks from Product service.
subtasks.details: Create POST /carts for new carts (guest UUID or user_id), POST /carts/{cart_id}/items with stock validation via /products/{id}/stock, PATCH/DELETE /carts/{cart_id}/items/{item_id}. Use async SQLAlchemy. Return 409 if quantity exceeds available stock.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test cart creation for guest/user, add item with sufficient/insufficient stock (expect 409), update/delete items, verify inventory not deducted prematurely.

subtasks.title: Frontend CartContext with localStorage Sync
subtasks.description: Develop React CartContext for managing cart state with localStorage for guests and backend sync for auth users.
subtasks.details: Use useReducer for cart state, localStorage for guest carts (key: cart_uuid), sync to backend on login/add item for auth users via fetch to /carts endpoints. Implement real-time subtotal calculation on state changes. Handle stock errors with toast notifications.
subtasks.testStrategy: Add items as guest, refresh - persists; login - merges to backend; change quantity - subtotal updates; stock error blocks add and shows message.

subtasks.title: Cart UI Slide-over Panel with Controls
subtasks.description: Build slide-over cart panel displaying items, quantities, subtotals with +/- controls and remove buttons.
subtasks.details: Use Headless UI or Tailwind for slide-over drawer triggered by cart icon. Show item image/name/price/quantity/subtotal per item + grand total. +/- buttons call CartContext updateItem, remove clears item. Persist open state in context. Mobile-responsive.
subtasks.testStrategy: Verify panel opens/closes, quantity changes update UI/backend/subtotal instantly, remove empties item, empty cart shows message, responsive on mobile.

subtasks.title: Guest-to-Auth Cart Merge and Persistence Testing
subtasks.description: Implement cart merge logic on login and comprehensive end-to-end testing for all cart scenarios.
subtasks.details: On login, POST localStorage cart to /carts/{user_id} merging duplicates (sum quantities, check stock). Clear localStorage post-sync. Write Cypress/Jest tests covering guest persistence, auth sync, stock blocks, subtotal accuracy, edge cases (offline, concurrent adds).
subtasks.testStrategy: E2E: Guest add→refresh→login→verify backend cart matches; stock insufficient during merge fails gracefully; quantity change mid-sync; empty cart persistence; multi-tab sync conflicts resolved.

tasks.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) Backend cart endpoints and stock validation, 2) Frontend CartContext with localStorage sync, 3) Cart UI slide-over panel with quantity controls, 4) Guest→auth user cart merge and persistence testing.

tasks.title: Atomic Order Processing and Payment Integration
tasks.description: Implement ACID-compliant checkout with stock deduction and Stripe/Mercado Pago integration.
tasks.details: POST /orders with @transactional decorator. Steps: 1) Validate cart stock, 2) Create Order+OrderItems, 3) Deduct Inventory, 4) Create Payment record, 5) Stripe.create_payment_intent(). Rollback on any failure. Webhook endpoint for payment confirmation. Use database.savepoint() for nested transactions.
tasks.testStrategy: Simulate checkout success: verify order created, stock deducted, payment record exists. Test stock insufficient: no deduction, order not created. Test payment failure: full rollback. Verify webhook updates payment status.

subtasks.title: Implement Transactional Order Creation Endpoint
subtasks.description: Create POST /orders endpoint with @transactional decorator including cart stock validation and Order+OrderItems creation.
subtasks.details: Use SQLAlchemy async session with @transactional. Validate cart items against Inventory.quantity using SELECT FOR UPDATE. Create Order and OrderItems if stock sufficient. Raise exception on validation failure for automatic rollback.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test valid cart creates order and items. Test insufficient stock returns 400 without creating records.

subtasks.title: Add Inventory Deduction with Rollback Logic
subtasks.description: Integrate inventory deduction step within transaction after order creation with proper error handling.
subtasks.details: After order creation, UPDATE Inventory SET quantity = quantity - ordered_qty WHERE product_variant_id IN (...) AND quantity >= ordered_qty. Use database constraints to prevent negative stock. Ensure full rollback on any SQLAlchemy exception.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test successful deduction reduces stock. Test race condition simulation where concurrent checkouts handle stock correctly. Verify rollback restores stock on failure.

subtasks.title: Integrate Stripe Payment Intent Creation
subtasks.description: Create Payment record and Stripe payment intent within transaction, handling payment failures.
subtasks.details: Create Payment(status='pending') record. Call stripe.PaymentIntent.create() with order total. Store client_secret in Payment record. On Stripe API error, raise exception for transaction rollback. Support Mercado Pago fallback via env var.
subtasks.testStrategy: Mock Stripe success: verify Payment record with client_secret. Mock Stripe failure: verify full rollback (no order, no stock change, no Payment record).

subtasks.title: Implement Webhook Endpoint for Payment Confirmation
subtasks.description: Create POST /webhooks/stripe endpoint to handle payment confirmation and update order status.
subtasks.details: Verify Stripe webhook signature. On 'payment_intent.succeeded', UPDATE Payment SET status='confirmed', UPDATE Order SET status='paid'. Use database.savepoint() for nested transaction. Idempotent handling for duplicate webhooks. Return 200 always.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate valid webhook: verify order status updates to 'paid'. Test invalid signature returns 400. Test duplicate webhook doesn't double-update.

subtasks.title: Add Nested Transactions with Savepoints and Full Test Suite
subtasks.description: Implement savepoint-based nested transactions and comprehensive test coverage for all scenarios.
subtasks.details: Use session.begin_nested() or SAVEPOINT commands around payment integration. Test all failure paths: stock validation fail, inventory constraint violation, Stripe API error, webhook failures. Include concurrency tests with pytest-asyncio and multiple workers.
subtasks.testStrategy: Full suite: success path, each failure rollback, concurrent checkouts (3+ parallel), webhook scenarios. Verify ACID properties: no overselling, no ghost orders, payment status sync. Load test 100 concurrent orders.

tasks.expansionPrompt: Divide into: 1) Transactional order creation with stock validation, 2) Inventory deduction and rollback logic, 3) Stripe payment intent creation, 4) Webhook handling for payment confirmation, 5) Nested transactions with savepoints and full test suite.

tasks.title: ERP Panel - Dashboard and KPIs
tasks.description: Build ERP Next.js frontend with authentication, dashboard KPIs, product/order management.
tasks.details: Create ERP app with shadcn/ui + Tailwind. Implement login page with JWT fetch. Dashboard page with KPI cards: total sales, revenue (date filter), top products, low stock alerts. Use Recharts for trends. Real-time updates via SWR mutate. RBAC redirects based on user.role.
tasks.testStrategy: Login as employee - dashboard loads KPIs correctly. Test date filter updates revenue. Verify low stock shows products < threshold. Test admin vs employee route access. Confirm real-time updates on new orders.

subtasks.title: Implement Authentication, RBAC Routing, and Login Page
subtasks.description: Create login page with JWT authentication fetch, middleware for token verification, and RBAC redirects based on user.role using shadcn/ui components.
subtasks.details: Use Next.js middleware to parse/verify JWT from cookies as shown in search results[1][2]. Implement /login page with form, fetch to API for token. Add protected routes redirecting admin to dashboard, employee to limited view. Store token in httpOnly cookie.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test login success stores token and redirects by role. Verify invalid credentials shows error. Test middleware blocks unauth access to /dashboard.

subtasks.title: Build Dashboard KPIs and Recharts Visualizations with Date Filters
subtasks.description: Develop dashboard page with KPI cards for total sales, revenue (date filter), top products, and Recharts trend charts using shadcn/ui and Tailwind.
subtasks.details: Create KPI cards with metrics from /api/sales, /api/products/top, /api/inventory/low. Add date picker for revenue filtering. Implement Recharts LineChart/BarChart for sales trends over time periods. Use responsive Tailwind grid layout.
subtasks.testStrategy: Login as employee - verify KPIs load with correct numbers. Test date filter updates revenue chart dynamically. Confirm top products list shows correctly. Check responsive layout on mobile.

subtasks.title: Add Real-time Updates with SWR Mutate and Low Stock Alerts
subtasks.description: Integrate SWR for data fetching/mutation on dashboard KPIs and implement real-time updates for new orders plus low stock alert notifications.
subtasks.details: Configure SWR hooks for all KPI endpoints with mutate function. Listen to WebSocket or polling for new orders to trigger mutate(). Display low stock alerts as toast notifications when inventory < threshold. Ensure updates reflect instantly across cards/charts.
subtasks.testStrategy: Simulate new order - verify all sales/revenue KPIs update real-time. Test low stock alert appears for products <10 units. Confirm SWR cache invalidation works on manual refresh.

tasks.expansionPrompt: Break into: 1) Authentication, RBAC routing, and login page, 2) Dashboard KPIs and Recharts visualizations with date filters, 3) Real-time updates with SWR mutate and low stock alerts.

tasks.title: ERP Product and Order Management + Security Hardening
tasks.description: Complete ERP CRUD for products/orders, add inventory movements, final security audit.
tasks.details: Product management: forms for create/edit/delete with image upload (Cloudinary/S3). Order list with status updates (pending→paid→shipped→cancelled). Inventory movements logged on all stock changes. Add CSRF tokens, input sanitization (bleach), helmet headers. Rate limiting on all endpoints.
tasks.testStrategy: Create/edit product - appears in store immediately. Update order status - logs movement. Test image upload/reorder. Verify delete blocked for ordered products. Security scan: no XSS/SQLi vulnerabilities. Load test dashboard <500ms.

subtasks.title: Implement ERP Product CRUD Forms with Image Upload
subtasks.description: Develop frontend forms for creating, editing, deleting products in ERP dashboard, integrating Cloudinary/S3 for image uploads, leveraging existing Product CRUD API.
subtasks.details: Use Next.js ERP frontend. Create React forms with validation, image preview, upload to Cloudinary/S3 on submit. Call FastAPI endpoints (POST/PATCH/DELETE /products). Handle admin permissions, show errors. Ensure images persist and display in list view.
subtasks.testStrategy: Test create/edit: product appears in store immediately with image. Verify delete blocked for ordered products. Check unauthorized access denied.

subtasks.title: Build Order Management UI with Status Workflows
subtasks.description: Create order list view in ERP with status update buttons (pending→paid→shipped→cancelled), integrating with backend order endpoints.
subtasks.details: Next.js ERP page listing orders with pagination/filtering. Modal or inline editors for status changes via PATCH /orders/{id}. Update inventory on status transitions. Display order items, totals, payments. Admin/employee role checks.
subtasks.testStrategy: Update order status: verify UI reflects change, inventory movement logged. Test workflow prevents invalid transitions (e.g., shipped→pending). Unauthorized updates return 403.

subtasks.title: Implement Inventory Movement Logging
subtasks.description: Log all inventory changes (product CRUD, order status updates) to InventoryMovement table across all relevant operations.
subtasks.details: Backend: Extend product/order endpoints to create InventoryMovement records on stock changes (create/update/delete product, order status). Frontend: Ensure UI shows current inventory. Use SQLAlchemy async for logging. Audit trail with timestamps, user_id, delta_quantity.
subtasks.testStrategy: Create product: movement logged. Update order to shipped: quantity deducted, movement logged. Verify logs queryable and accurate.

subtasks.title: Apply Security Hardening Measures
subtasks.description: Add CSRF tokens, input sanitization with bleach, Helmet security headers, and rate limiting to all endpoints.
subtasks.details: Backend: Integrate CSRF middleware, bleach for HTML sanitization on inputs, helmet.js equivalent for FastAPI headers (CSP, HSTS). Extend slowapi rate limiting to all /api/v1 endpoints. Frontend: CSRF token in forms.
subtasks.testStrategy: Security scan: no XSS/SQLi vulnerabilities. Test rate limiting blocks excessive requests. Verify headers present in responses.

subtasks.title: Conduct Load Testing and Security Scanning
subtasks.description: Perform comprehensive load testing on dashboard/endpoints and final security audit for vulnerabilities.
subtasks.details: Use tools like Artillery/Locust for load tests (<500ms dashboard). Scan with Bandit, OWASP ZAP, npm audit. Test image upload/reorder, high concurrency orders. Document results and fixes.
subtasks.testStrategy: Load test: 100 concurrent users, verify <500ms response. Security scan: zero critical vulnerabilities. Validate all test cases from parent task.

tasks.expansionPrompt: Split into: 1) ERP product CRUD forms with image upload, 2) Order management with status workflows, 3) Inventory movement logging, 4) Security hardening (CSRF, sanitization, headers), 5) Load testing and security scanning.
